features.title: Adaptive Shared Cooking
features.headline: One Dinner. Two Plates.
features.shortDescription: Same recipe. Two plates. Both partners hit their goals — automatically. No math, no separate cooking, no arguments.
features.longDescription: When you share a life, you share meals. But traditional meal planning apps treat everyone as an isolated individual. They expect you to either abandon your goals to eat the same thing, or cook completely separate dinners. We solved this. You follow one single cooking workflow together. When the food is ready, the app provides visual, AI-adapted plating guides. It tells you exactly how much chicken to give Partner A, and how much extra rice to give Partner B.
benefits: Same meal prep, different portions — automatically optimized
No more cooking two separate meals or doing separate cleanup
Both partners hit their calorie and macro targets without thinking
Reduces kitchen time, dish count, and dinnertime stress

partnerA.name: Partner A
partnerA.plate: 4oz chicken over bed of spinach, ½ cup rice

partnerB.name: Partner B
partnerB.plate: 6oz chicken over full cup of rice, side of vegetables

features.title: Real-Time Sync
features.headline: Never Buy Milk Twice
features.shortDescription: Add milk at home. It appears on your partner's phone at the store in under 100ms. No phone calls. No 'did you already buy this?' texts.
features.longDescription: Our shared grocery list uses lightning-fast real-time sync. Add an item from home and it appears on your partner's phone at the store in under 100ms. Check off an item at the store and it disappears from the shared list instantly. No phone calls, no duplicate purchases, no confusion. When you check something off, tap 'Move to Pantry' and the cycle starts again.
benefits: Updates in under 100 milliseconds — faster than blinking
Both partners see changes instantly, no matter where they are
Works offline — queues sync when reconnected, never lose data
No more duplicate purchases or 'I thought you bought it' arguments

features.title: Pantry-First AI
features.headline: Your Fridge Just Became a Menu
features.shortDescription: Type 'chicken, rice, spinach.' AI shows you meals you can make right now with zero shopping. Less waste, fewer trips, more money saved.
features.longDescription: Stop staring into the fridge wondering what to cook. Tell Couples Food System what you have, and our AI generates meal suggestions that use your existing ingredients. Type or dictate naturally: "We have chicken, rice, spinach, and half an onion." The AI understands and creates meals around what you already own. Less waste, fewer trips to the store, more money in your pocket.
benefits: Natural language input — just type what you have, no barcode scanning
Reduces food waste by prioritizing meals that use existing ingredients
Saves money on unnecessary grocery trips
AI suggests meals you'd never think of on your own

features.title: Collaborative Planning
features.headline: Your Week, Planned Together
features.shortDescription: One tap generates 7 days of meals for both of you. Missing ingredients auto-populate your grocery list. Sunday planning: 5 minutes, not 50.
features.longDescription: Plan your entire week in one tap. Our AI creates a shared meal plan that respects both partners' dietary preferences and goals. Missing ingredients automatically populate your shared grocery list. Both partners see and edit the same plan in real-time. Sunday planning becomes a 5-minute conversation, not an hour-long negotiation.
benefits: AI generates a full week of meals respecting both partners' needs
Missing ingredients auto-populate your shared grocery list
Real-time collaborative editing — both partners contribute
Reduces weekly planning from 50 minutes to 5

steps.title: Invite Your Partner
steps.description: Link your accounts to create your shared digital kitchen. "We" replaces "You" from day one.

steps.title: Set Your Goals
steps.description: Partner A wants more energy; Partner B wants to build strength. Set your individual preferences behind the scenes — the app handles the math.

steps.title: Stock the Pantry
steps.description: Quickly log what you already have. Type "chicken, rice, spinach" — no barcode scanning, no friction. Our AI uses this to suggest smart, waste-free meals.

steps.title: Generate Meals
steps.description: Hit generate. We create a weekly plan with one unified, real-time grocery list. Missing ingredients are flagged automatically.

steps.title: Cook Together
steps.description: Follow one simple recipe, then plate it two ways based on your individual needs. Same pan. Same meal. Different plates. Eat together in peace.
